title: Trinity: The Second Overtone
description: Type, Strategy, Authority. The three-fold structure that gives the blueprint its dynamic stability — the perfect fifth.
learningGoal: User understands Type, Strategy, and Authority as a triadic structure that produces dynamic stability — not a checklist but a relationship.
keyPoints: Trinity is the second overtone — the perfect fifth, 3:2
Type is what you are; Strategy is how you move; Authority is how you decide
Each one alone is incomplete; together they triangulate the living self
Three points make a plane — Trinity is what gives the blueprint its dynamic stability
forbiddenClaims: follow your strategy and life will be perfect
the trinity is a fixed formula
toneNotes: Architectural and clear. Establish that Type, Strategy, and Authority are not three separate features but one triadic structure. Use the metaphor of a tripod — any two will fall over.
narration_script:
Two points define a line. Three points define a plane.

This is why the second overtone is the perfect fifth. Three to two. The first interval that stabilizes the octave. The first sound that introduces structure into pure polarity.

In your blueprint, the trinity is Type, Strategy, and Authority.

Type is what you are. The shape of your energy. Generator, Manifesting Generator, Projector, Manifestor, Reflector. It is your structural class, the way your design moves through the world before you decide anything.

Strategy is how you move. Respond. Inform. Wait for invitation. Wait the lunar cycle. Each type has one. The strategy is not advice — it is the actual mechanics of how life works for you when you stop forcing it.

Authority is how you decide. Sacral, Emotional, Splenic, Self-Projected, Ego, Mental, Lunar. Your authority is the inner faculty that knows before the mind gets involved. It is the signal under the noise.

Each one alone is incomplete.

Type without Strategy is identity without movement. Strategy without Authority is movement without decision. Authority without Type is decision without context.

Three points make a plane. The trinity is what gives your blueprint its dynamic stability. It is the structure that holds while you live inside it.

This is the second overtone of your design.
